title: Vegan Portuguese Flaky Oatmeal Wrap
description: A delicious and healthy vegan wrap filled with crispy oatmeal and flaky portuguese ingredients.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add vegan butter and spread evenly.
Place flaky crostini in the pan and toast until crispy.
In a separate bowl, mix oatmeal and salt.
Add oatmeal mixture on top of the crostini.
Place sliced avocado on top of the oatmeal mixture.
Sprinkle chopped cilantro over the avocado.
Warm the wrap in the microwave for 10 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by placing the oatmeal mixture in the center.
Fold the wrap and serve immediately.
